question_en: How is long-term money supply expansion described here?
choices_en: As a structural process built into the system
As a neutral way to improve savings
question_ko: 이 장은 장기적 통화 공급 확대를 어떻게 설명하는가?
explanation_en: Money supply growth is presented as a structural feature that steadily dilutes purchasing power.
explanation_ko: 통화 공급 확대는 구매력을 꾸준히 희석하는 구조적 특징으로 제시된다.
